A

addHitMarker(Coordinate) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.board.BoardSpriteLayer
Places a hit marker sprite at the given coordinate.
addMissMarker(Coordinate) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.board.BoardSpriteLayer
Places a miss marker sprite at the given coordinate.
addShipOverlay(Ship, Coordinate) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.board.BoardSpriteLayer
Places a live (non-sunk) ship sprite overlay at the ship's head coordinate.
AIRCRAFT_CARRIER - Enum constant in enum class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.enums.ShipType
 
AlreadyShotException - Exception in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.exceptions
Thrown when a shot is attempted on a cell that has already been fired upon.
AlreadyShotException(String) - Constructor for exception com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.exceptions.AlreadyShotException
Creates a new exception with a descriptive message.
APP_TITLE - Static variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.AppInitializer
 
AppInitializer - Class in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model
Handles the application's bootstrapping sequence and initial stage preparation.
AppInitializer() - Constructor for class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.AppInitializer
 
assignShip(Ship) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.Cell
Assigns a ship to this cell and marks it as CellState.SHIP.
